Structures / Yards.note: Structure and yard polygons; labels on by default.

Chemical Locations.note: Chemical storage/use locations; labels on by default.

Irrigation.note: Irrigation features; labels off by default and shown when selected.

Trees.note: Tree points; labels off by default and points clustered/searchable.

Prune North.note: Prune North layer; use project filter/search.

Prune South.note: Prune South layer; use project filter/search.

Block #23.note: Block boundary layer; lower opacity, labels on.

Block #25.note: Block boundary layer; lower opacity, labels on.
